meme_1.label: Meme 1
meme_1.overlay_text: When you start journaling and your whole personality upgrades
meme_1.fb_caption: Y'all, I didn't believe in journaling until I actually started. Three months later I barely recognize how unbothered I am. 😌 Who else has a journal that's basically their therapist? Tag your journaling bestie below!

meme_2.label: Meme 2
meme_2.overlay_text: Me writing in my diary instead of texting him back
meme_2.fb_caption: Not me choosing my journal over sending that midnight text. 😅 The healing era is real. Has your journal ever saved you from yourself? Drop a ✨ if journaling helped you get through something tough.

repost_1.label: Repost 1
repost_1.creator: thejournallab
repost_1.ig_caption: Self-care starts when you give time back to yourself. This reel is a beautiful reminder that journaling isn't just a trend — it's a practice. Save it for when you need a reset. ✍️

repost_2.label: Repost 2
repost_2.creator: thematthewhussey
repost_2.ig_caption: Relationships, healing, and dating advice from one of the best coaches in the game. @thematthewhussey always drops gems that make you stop and reflect. 💭 Save this one for your next journaling session.

quote_1.label: Quote 1
quote_1.quote: Tell me, what is it you plan to do with your one wild and precious life?
quote_1.fb_caption: This question stops me every time. ✨ Save it for when you need a reminder that this life is yours to design — not to defer. What would your answer be today? Tell us below 👇

quote_2.label: Quote 2
quote_2.quote: The wound is the place where the Light enters you.
quote_2.fb_caption: Let that land for a second. 💜 Whatever you're carrying right now — it's not the end of your story. Sometimes the hardest chapters hold the most light. Share this with someone who needs to hear it today.
